creator: frank@moov.de
text:
Hi Boris,

> are you sure that @dirrm removes the directory? 
> It should not! [...]

well, I tried to reproduce it again on a fresh Virtual Machine, 
but the file does NOT get deleted. This means there is no 
problem with security/cyrus-sasl2, it must be something
else on the system where the problem appeared. I should have
noticed this before opening this PR.

Besides that I had a wrong understanding of @dirrm and
@dirrmtry. I found that a slightly different phrase in
the german translation of the Porter's Handbook confused 
me.

Sorry for wasting time. Please close this PR.


Kind regards

Frank Wall
